tasks.title: Define generic carrier action packet envelope
tasks.goal: Define the inert proposal envelope for all Narada-native action handoff families.
tasks.context: Carrier outputs must be reconstructable proposals until canonical Narada surfaces admit them.
required_work: Define fields packet_id, carrier_session_id, action_family, status=inert_proposal, summary, payload_summary, payload_ref, requires_canonical_admission=true, raw_transcript_recorded=false, and direct_mutation_performed=false.
Cover task-report, inbox, command intent, outbox intent, and repository publication families.
Add schema tests for all families and no-authority flags.
non_goals: Do not execute any effect from the envelope.
Do not treat model output as accepted evidence.
Do not record raw transcripts or raw provider output.
acceptance_criteria: A generic inert action packet envelope exists.
All required action families are represented.
Tests prove canonical admission is required and direct mutation is false.

tasks.title: Implement task-report handoff family
tasks.goal: Implement inert task-report draft packets for canonical task report admission.
tasks.context: The carrier may draft a work result report but must not submit or close it.
required_work: Include task number/id, report summary, changed-file refs, verification refs, residuals, and suggested narada task report command.
Write the draft as a reconstructable payload ref.
Add tests proving no task lifecycle mutation occurs before canonical admission.
non_goals: Do not call narada task report, review, close, finish, or confirm.
Do not store raw task markdown or provider transcript.
Do not mark draft evidence accepted.
acceptance_criteria: Task-report handoff packets are inert and reconstructable.
Suggested canonical admission command is present.
Tests prove lifecycle state is not mutated.

tasks.title: Implement inbox handoff family
tasks.goal: Implement inert inbox proposal packets without envelope transition authority.
tasks.context: The carrier may propose inbox submissions or promotions but must leave envelope admission to canonical inbox surfaces.
required_work: Include envelope kind, source ref, authority assertion, bounded payload summary, and suggested inbox submit/import/triage/promote surface.
Add tests proving no inbox database write or status transition occurs.
non_goals: Do not submit, import, triage, promote, archive, or task inbox envelopes.
Do not write .ai/inbox.db from the carrier.
Do not record unbounded payload bodies.
acceptance_criteria: Inbox handoff packets are bounded and inert.
Canonical inbox admission surface is explicit.
Tests prove no inbox mutation occurs.

tasks.title: Implement command intent handoff family
tasks.goal: Implement inert CEIZ command run request drafts.
tasks.context: Command execution requires a governed command intent zone crossing, not direct carrier process spawn.
required_work: Represent argv vector, cwd, env policy, side-effect class, timeout, output admission profile, and rationale.
Use payload refs for bounded drafts.
Add tests proving no process spawn occurs and shell strings/env secrets are not persisted.
non_goals: Do not persist secret-bearing env values.
Do not stringify argv into an unsafe shell command.
acceptance_criteria: Command intent packets match CEIZ draft posture.
No process is spawned by the carrier.
Tests prove env secrets and unsafe shell strings are not persisted.

tasks.title: Implement outbox and publication handoff families
tasks.goal: Implement inert outbox and repository publication proposal packets.
tasks.context: Outbound transport and repository publication must remain owned by canonical outbox and publication zones.
required_work: Define outbox intent shape with target kind/ref, transport, route/capability refs, bounded payload body/ref, and approval posture.
Define RPIZ publication intent draft with repo root, branch, task linkage, include paths, message summary, and preparation command.
Add tests proving no transport send, commit, or push occurs.
non_goals: Do not commit or push repositories.
Do not treat publication preparation as publication confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: Outbox and publication handoff packets are inert and reconstructable.
Tests prove no outbound transport, commit, or push occurs.

tasks.title: Add handoff reconstruction and doctor integration
tasks.goal: Expose handoff artifacts through readiness and doctor by id, family, and status only.
tasks.context: Operators need handoff visibility without raw transcript or payload leakage.
required_work: List handoff artifacts in readiness and supervisor doctor output by id, family, status, and payload ref.
Reconstruct all handoff families from durable JSON refs.
Add tests proving reconstruction omits raw transcripts and direct mutation remains false.
non_goals: Do not display raw model transcripts or unbounded payloads.
Do not execute admission commands from doctor.
Do not make doctor output authority.
acceptance_criteria: Handoff artifacts are visible by bounded refs in readiness/doctor output.
All handoff families reconstruct from durable JSON refs.
Tests prove raw transcripts are absent and mutation flags remain false.
